title: JARVIS Step 21 — Post-Polish Live Smoke Memo
conclusion_detail: The Step 20 UI-only polish is live and healthy. /jarvis and /api/jarvis/status both return 200, all six new section dividers and the posture legend render, every key panel (including pCacheFreshness in its new grouped location) is present, the API shape is unchanged at 24 top-level keys with the read-only trading posture intact, and the served HTML contains no execution or refresh affordance.

ui_panels_checklist.note: renders in the new grouped Safety & Reliability location alongside Health Report and Route Smoke

safety_scan.detail: Served /jarvis HTML contains no <button>, <form>, onclick, method="post", or /api/jarvis/refresh reference. The console remains a single GET fetch to /api/jarvis/status, polled on a timer.

known_non_blocking_warnings: commander_snapshot may remain yellow due to the large untracked-file backlog and a dirty working tree (conservative by design, not an error). Observed overall_state = yellow this run.
/money-spartan may report a non-required 404 in the route smoke report.
A corrupted 'hydra ' directory can break bare pytest collection, so the scoped pytest command (--rootdir=tests) is used.
